architectReview.evidence: Architect review cleared the runtime-family scaffold after confirming the locked national-average runtime contract, file-backed container/worker artifacts, and honest baseline placeholders. Evidence: agent://24-G001ArchitectFinal and artifacts/g001-cleanup-report.txt.

executorQa.evidence: Parent verification passed TypeScript, lint, build, worker bootstrap, rendered web shell markers, and screenshot capture. Executor QA cleared the final scaffold with adversarial env-lock checks. Evidence: agent://25-G001QaFinal, artifacts/g001-command-report.txt, artifacts/g001-web-evidence.json, artifacts/g001-home.png.
redTeamCommands: node --import tsx -e "process.env.DATABASE_URL='postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/opinet_diesel_dashboard?schema=public'; process.env.OPINET_DATASET_KEY='rogue-dataset'; import('./src/lib/env.ts').then(()=>{ console.log('unexpected-success'); process.exit(1); }).catch((error)=>{ console.log(String(error.message || error)); });"

node --import tsx -e "process.env.DATABASE_URL='postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/opinet_diesel_dashboard?schema=public'; process.env.QUEUE_DOMAIN='override-domain'; import('./src/lib/env.ts').then(()=>{ console.log('unexpected-success'); process.exit(1); }).catch((error)=>{ console.log(String(error.message || error)); });"

node --import tsx -e "process.env.DATABASE_URL='postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/opinet_diesel_dashboard?schema=public'; process.env.RUNTIME_FAMILY='serverless'; import('./src/lib/env.ts').then(()=>{ console.log('unexpected-success'); process.exit(1); }).catch((error)=>{ console.log(String(error.message || error)); });"

artifactRefs.description: Browser smoke evidence for the rendered national-average-only scaffold page.
Non-uniform screenshot of the live scaffold page.
Command-level verification log for typecheck, lint, build, worker bootstrap, marker fetch, and screenshot capture.
Manual cleanup sweep over the G001 scaffold files.

contractCoverage.obligation: The project scaffolds the locked container-web-postgres-cron runtime family.
The scaffold hard-locks national-average-only dataset scope.
The scheduled worker entrypoint boots successfully with locked scaffold env values.
The public scaffold page renders the national-average-only MVP shell.

surfaceEvidence.invocation: npm run dev -- --hostname 127.0.0.1 --port 3005 && npx playwright screenshot http://127.0.0.1:3005 artifacts/g001-home.png

adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: national-average-only 잠금이 유지되며 env 파서가 즉시 실패해야 한다.
queue 도메인 잠금이 유지되며 env 파서가 즉시 실패해야 한다.
idle-shell 요약을 출력하고 비정상 종료하지 않아야 한다.
대시보드 제목과 National-average-only MVP 마커가 존재해야 한다.

iteration.evidence: 초기 리뷰에서 드러난 런타임 패밀리 누락과 dataset override 누수를 수정했고, 전체 검증 및 리뷰를 다시 수행해 blocker 없는 결과를 확인했다.
